briefdescription.para: Enumeration of error codes used in the proof classes.
Pair of key and value to be stored in CRDT.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< boost::asio::io_context > context, std::string databasePath, std::shared_ptr< sgns::ipfs_pubsub::GossipPubSub > pubsub, std::shared_ptr< CrdtOptions > crdtOptions, std::shared_ptr< sgns::ipfs_lite::ipfs::graphsync::Network > graphsyncnetwork, std::shared_ptr< libp2p::protocol::Scheduler > scheduler, std::shared_ptr< sgns::ipfs_lite::ipfs::graphsync::RequestIdGenerator > generator, std::shared_ptr< RocksDB > datastore=nullptr)
memberdef.name: New

briefdescription.para: Factory method to create a GlobalDB instance.

parameterdescription.para: The io context used to run its inner methods
Local system's path where data will be stored, not used if datastore is not nullptr
The pubsub instance used to communicate
CRDT options
The graphsync networks used
libp2p scheduler
The request ID generator from graphsync
datastore to be used. If not defined, created using databasePath

simplesect.para: Instance of the GlobalDB initialized or Error

memberdef.argsstring: (const HierarchicalKey &key, const Buffer &value, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &topics)
memberdef.name: Put

briefdescription.para: Puts key-value pair to the CRDT store, optionally specifying a broadcast topic.

parameterdescription.para: The hierarchical key where the value should be stored.
The value to store.
Topics to publish to.

simplesect.para: outcome::success on success, or outcome::failure otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Writes a batch of CRDT data all at once.

parameterdescription.para: A set of crdt to be written in a single transaction
Topics to publish to.

simplesect.para: outcome::failure on error or success otherwise

detaileddescription.para:
Gets a value that corresponds to specified key.
key
- value key
value as a Buffer

Removes value for a given key.
key
to remove from storage
topics
Topics to publish to
outcome::failure on error or success otherwise

Queries CRDT key-value pairs by prefix. If the prefix is empty returns all elements that were not tombstoned
keyPrefix
- keys prefix to match. An empty prefix matches any key.
list of key-value pairs matches prefix

briefdescription.para: Queries with a middle part that can be a wildcard, negated string or normal string.

parameterdescription.para: The base prefix to query
Either a string (normal query), '*' or !string
The remainder part of the query prefix

simplesect.para: A list of key value pairs

detaileddescription.para:
Converts a unique key part to a string representation
key
- binary key to convert
string represenation of a unique key part

Create a transaction object
new transaction

briefdescription.para: Request head broadcast for specified topics.

parameterdescription.para: Vector of topic names to broadcast heads for

simplesect.para: outcome::success on success, or outcome::failure on error

briefdescription.para: Get the topics that are being listened to.

simplesect.para: A set of the monitored topic names

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< boost::asio::io_context > context, std::string databasePath, std::shared_ptr< sgns::ipfs_pubsub::GossipPubSub > pubsub)
memberdef.name: GlobalDB

briefdescription.para: Constructs a new Global D B object.

parameterdescription.para: the io context used to run inner methods
the local path where the files are gonna be stored
the pubsub instance used to communicate
